title: dendranthema jeongseonense
intro: Dendranthema jeongseonense, also known as Jeongseon daisy or Korean mountain daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is traditionally used in Korean medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dendranthema jeongseonense include reducing inflammation and pain, improving immune function, and potentially aiding in the prevention of various diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a raw vegetable or added to soups and salads.
